## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / internal improvement

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests updated/added
- [ ] Happy path verified
- [ ] Edge cases verified
- [ ] Negative case verified

Commands run:

```bash
# example
python3 -m compileall custom_components/nextfirst
pytest
```

## Home Assistant checks

- [ ] Config Flow works
- [ ] Options Flow works
- [ ] Services still callable
- [ ] Sidebar panel still loads (if affected)

## Security / privacy checks

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Sensitive values are masked in logs
- [ ] External API behavior documented (if changed)

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] Developer docs updated (if needed)
